message:
feat(vfs/pager): implement multi-platform VFS backends and pager improvements

Build out the virtual filesystem and page cache layers:

- VFS traits (+108 lines): define the core VFS interface (open, delete,
  access, full_pathname, randomness, sleep, current_time) and shared
  memory mapping API for WAL support
- VFS memory (+332 lines): in-memory VFS implementation backed by
  Arc<Mutex<Vec<u8>>> with sector-aligned I/O simulation
- VFS shm (+144 lines): shared memory region manager for WAL-mode
  coordination between concurrent readers/writers
- VFS unix (+332 lines): POSIX filesystem backend with advisory locking
  (fcntl), fsync durability, and direct I/O support detection
- VFS windows (+363 lines): Win32 filesystem backend with LockFileEx,
  FlushFileBuffers, and overlapped I/O handling
- Pager arc_cache (+5 lines): minor cache eviction refinements
- Pager (+8 lines): WAL mode integration adjustments
- VFS Cargo.toml: add platform-specific dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
